ORDER DENYING DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GARY SAUNDERS' MOTION TO QUASH PLAINTIFF'S SERVICE OF SUMMONS: DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN THAT IT PROPERLY SERVED DEFENDANT BY SUBSTITUTE SERVICE IN COMPLIANCE WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 415.20. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-08-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GARY SAUNDERS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO DECEMBER 10, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE DEFENDANT SHALL PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF HIS REPLY BRIEF AND A COPY OF THE COMPLAINT IN COMPLIANCE WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT GARY SAUNDERS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. WHETHER THE CONTRACT IS VOID/VOIDABLE IS A FACTUAL ISSUES THAT CANNOT BE RESOLVED ON DEMURRER. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES PERFORMANCE AND DAMAGES. INDEED, CCP 457 EXPRESSLY STATES THAT PERFORMANCE CAN BE PLEADED GENERALLY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2014 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-08-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2013 Set For Trial On Jun-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert F. Cohen, Esq., 800.492.2657, for defendant Gary Saunders; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT GARY SAUNDERS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled. Whether the contract is void/voidable is a factual issues that cannot be resolved on demurrer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges performance and damages. Indeed, CCP 457 expressly states that performance can be pleaded generally. Order signed in open Court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2012 Continued To Dec-10-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT GARY SAUNDERS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to December 10, 2012. The defendant shall provide a courtesy copy of his reply brief and a copy of the complaint in compliance with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 = (302/MJM)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: KEN LAMANCE, ESQ., 415.827.6392, FOR PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM. ZACH TARN, ESQ., 415.850.9067, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT SAUNDERS.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT GARY SAUNDERS' MOTION TO QUASH PLAINTIFF'S SERVICE OF SUMMONS: Denied. Plaintiff has shown that it properly served defendant by substitute service in compliance with Code of Civil Procedure 415.20. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
